title: Health Check Result Aggregator
description:
Each line is `service_name\tUP|DOWN` (tab-separated). Return:

```
total N
up N
down N
down_services svc1,svc2
```

`down_services` lists DOWN service names sorted alphabetically and comma-separated (empty string after the key if none are down).
constraints: Input is a plain string passed to solve(input string) string
Return a string matching the expected output exactly
Return empty string where the problem specifies no results

examples.input:
api	UP
db	DOWN
cache	UP
queue	DOWN
examples.explanation: See test case: Mixed UP and DOWN

test_cases.input:
api	UP
db	DOWN
cache	UP
queue	DOWN
